summaryAm: ጎልዲሎክስ በጫካ ውስጥ አዲስ ቤት ስታገኝ የሌሎችን ነገር መከበር የምትማርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: የሌሎችን ቤት መከበር እና ከመጠቀም በፊት መጠየቅ ጥሩ ልማድ ነው።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ጎልዲሎክስ በፀሐይ ቀን በጫካ መንገድ ትጓዝ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Goldilocks walked along a forest path on a sunny day.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Goldilocks and the Three Bears, page 1: ጎልዲሎክስ በፀሐይ ቀን በጫካ መንገድ ትጓዝ ነበር።

pages.textAm: በዛፎች መካከል ትንሽ ቆንጆ ቤት አየች።
pages.textEn: She saw a pretty little house among the trees.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Goldilocks and the Three Bears, page 2: በዛፎች መካከል ትንሽ ቆንጆ ቤት አየች።

pages.textAm: በሩን አንኳኳች፣ መልስ ሳትሰማ ግን መጠበቅ እንዳለባት አስታወሰች።
pages.textEn: She knocked on the door, and when no one answered, she remembered she should wait.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Goldilocks and the Three Bears, page 3: በሩን አንኳኳች፣ መልስ ሳትሰማ ግን መጠበቅ እንዳለባት አስታወሰች።

pages.textAm: በመስኮት በኩል ሦስት ትንንሽ አልጋዎችን አየች። ደክሟት ነበር፣ ግን መጠየቅ እንደሚገባ አስታወሰች።
pages.textEn: Through the window, she saw three small beds. She was tired, but remembered she should ask first.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of Goldilocks seeing three small beds through a cottage window and remembering to ask first.

pages.textAm: ሦስቱ ድቦች ሲመለሱ ጎልዲሎክስ በደግነት ይቅርታ ጠየቀች።
pages.textEn: When the three bears returned, Goldilocks kindly apologized.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Goldilocks and the Three Bears, page 5: ሦስቱ ድቦች ሲመለሱ ጎልዲሎክስ በደግነት ይቅርታ ጠየቀች።

pages.textAm: ድቦቹ ይቅርታዋን በደግነት ሰሙ። “ከሻይ በፊት ትንሽ በበሩ አጠገብ እንጠብቅ” አሉ።
pages.textEn: The bears kindly listened to her apology and suggested waiting by the door before tea.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Goldilocks and the Three Bears, page 6: the three bears kindly listen to Goldilocks near the cottage door before tea.

pages.textAm: ጎልዲሎክስ በበሩ ፊት ተቀምጣ ጠበቀች። “የሌላ ሰው ቤት የራሱ ደንብ አለው” ብላ አሰበች።
pages.textEn: Goldilocks waited by the door and remembered that every home has its own rules.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Goldilocks waiting politely outside a small forest cottage.

pages.textAm: በመስኮቱ አጠገብ ትንሽ ወፍ ዘመረች። ጎልዲሎክስም ወፏን ስትሰማ መጠበቅ እንደሚቻል ተረጋጋች።
pages.textEn: A bird sang by the window, helping Goldilocks wait calmly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Goldilocks listening to a small bird near a cottage window.

pages.textAm: በለስላሳው አልጋ አጠገብ ጎልዲሎክስ ቆም ብላ አሰበች። “የሌሎችን ቤት ከመጠቀም በፊት መጠየቅ ይሻላል” አለች።
pages.textEn: Beside the soft bed, Goldilocks paused and remembered that asking first is best.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of Goldilocks beside three small beds, pausing to remember that she should ask first.

pages.textAm: ጎልዲሎክስ ይቅርታ ጠይቃ ሳህኖቹን ለማዘጋጀት ረዳች። ትንሹ ድብም ለእሷ ትንሽ ጽዋ አመጣ።
pages.textEn: Goldilocks apologized and helped set the table for tea.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Goldilocks helping three bears set a small tea table.

pages.textAm: ከሻዩ በኋላ ጎልዲሎክስ ወደ ቤቷ በደስታ ተመለሰች። በሌላ ቀን ስትመጣ በመጀመሪያ አንኳኳች እና ፈቃድ ጠየቀች።
pages.textEn: After tea, Goldilocks went home and remembered to knock and ask next time.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Goldilocks waving goodbye to three bears on a sunny forest path.
